---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: ""
labels: bug
---

**What package?** (e.g. `@knitkit/runtime`, `@knitkit/cli`, …) and version:

**Environment:** browser (which/version) / Node (version) / edge runtime:

**What happened**
A clear description. Include the coded error if there is one (e.g. `KNIT_ERR_NEGOTIATION_CONFLICT`)
and its `suggestion`.

**Minimal reproduction**
Steps or a small repo/snippet. The manifest(s) and the `registerRemotes`/`loadRemote` call help a lot.

**Expected vs actual**

**Anything else** (import map, CSP, CORS setup, etc.)
